/usr/bin/ar qc liboe_common.a CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/validation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/debug_layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/device_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/command_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/sync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/swapchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/common/backend_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oe_common.dir/targets/null/null_backend.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liboe_common.a
